mapper.insert: insert into activity_train (activityTrainId, trainName, trainImgUrl, videoImgUrl,videoUrl, createdDate, introduce) values (#{activityTrainId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trainName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trainImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{videoImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{videoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into activity_train
activityTrainId,
trainName,
trainImgUrl,
videoImgUrl,
videoUrl,
createdDate,
introduce,
#{activityTrainId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{trainName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{trainImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{videoImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{videoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update activity_train
trainName = #{trainName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trainImgUrl = #{trainImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
videoImgUrl = #{videoImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
videoUrl = #{videoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
introduce = #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where activityTrainId = #{activityTrainId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update activity_train set trainName = #{trainName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trainImgUrl = #{trainImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, videoImgUrl = #{videoImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, videoUrl = #{videoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, introduce = #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where activityTrainId = #{activityTrainId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update activity_train set trainName = #{trainName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trainImgUrl = #{trainImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, videoImgUrl = #{videoImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, videoUrl = #{videoUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where activityTrainId = #{activityTrainId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT activityTrainId,trainName FROM activity_train ORDER BY createdDate DESC
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT trainName, trainImgUrl,videoImgUrl,videoUrl, introduce FROM activity_train WHERE activityTrainId = #{id}
